bupt.ta.model

类 AiApiSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.model.AiApiSettings

  • public class AiApiSettings
extends java.lang.Object
    Admin-managed LLM (DeepSeek-compatible) API settings. Persisted to data/ai-api-settings.json; consumed by DeepSeekClient via DeepSeekClient.fromAdminSettings(AiApiSettings).

    The API key is stored as plain text in the data directory (sufficient for a course project; in production, use a secrets manager and restrict file system permissions).

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明

      java.lang.String getModel()

      boolean isApiEnabled() 
      boolean isEffectivelyConfigured() 
      boolean isStreamingEnabled()
      When true, text-producing endpoints stream tokens to the browser via SSE; when false they return a single JSON payload.

    • 方法详细资料

      • isApiEnabled

        public boolean isApiEnabled()

      • setApiEnabled

        public void setApiEnabled(boolean apiEnabled)

      • isStreamingEnabled

        public boolean isStreamingEnabled()
        When true, text-producing endpoints stream tokens to the browser via SSE; when false they return a single JSON payload. Affects match insight + applicant summary; CV extraction always uses the JSON path because the response must be a parseable object.

      • setStreamingEnabled

        public void setStreamingEnabled(boolean streamingEnabled)

      • getProvider

        public java.lang.String getProvider()

      • setProvider

        public void setProvider(java.lang.String provider)

      • getBaseUrl

        public java.lang.String getBaseUrl()

      • setBaseUrl

        public void setBaseUrl(java.lang.String baseUrl)

      • getModel

        public java.lang.String getModel()

      • setModel

        public void setModel(java.lang.String model)

      • getApiKey

        public java.lang.String getApiKey()
        Plain-text API key. Empty string means "no key configured".

      • setApiKey

        public void setApiKey(java.lang.String apiKey)

      • isEffectivelyConfigured

        public boolean isEffectivelyConfigured()
        返回:
        true if a real call is allowed: enabled and key present. The provider field is treated as a free-form label and is not validated here, because the underlying HTTP client speaks the OpenAI-compatible protocol that several vendors (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Moonshot, Ollama, ...) already support.
